title: Summary: Turn 9
content: The assistant's specialties include code reading and understanding of the 2000+ TypeScript files in the Pueblo project (CLI, commands, workflow, tools, providers, sessions, memory, persistence), precise code editing/repair, project knowledge Q&A (config, build, testing, native module ABI), pattern matching with grep/glob, and maintaining consistent project style, but it avoids game-related queries, large-scale refactoring, or undocumented projects.
